game_meta.name: Deadlock
game_meta.tagline: Valve's 6v6 hero-shooter MOBA hybrid. 4 lanes, soul/gold farming, item shop, mid boss.
game_meta.character_vocab: heroes (20+ launch roster, each with 4 abilities + ult)
key_mechanics: Soul economy — kills + minions + neutral souls
Item shop (vitality, spirit, weapon categories with active items)
Z-axis verticality — wall jumping, dashing, rope sliding
Lane phase → mid game → patron push

main-map.name: The Deadlock Map
main-map.notes: 4 lanes, mid boss, urn. Single map.

Tank.notes: Abrams, Bebop tank build. Soak damage, peel for carries.

DPS.notes: Haze, Infernus. Scales late game with items.

Diver.notes: Lash, Mo & Krill. Single-target burst from advantage.

Sniper.notes: Vindicta, Grey Talon. Pick from elevated angles.

Support.notes: Dynamo, Kelvin. CC + healing + zone control.

low: Last-hitting minions only — should also deny if soul-share active
Wrong item path (vitality when you need spirit)
mid: Bad mid-boss timing — taking with low HP
Not buying active items at item shop
high: Sub-optimal soul management (banking when should spend)

review_template.style: Specific over generic. Reference visible HUD elements, in-game timers, and concrete tactical concepts. Never say "play smart" or "use abilities better".

vocabulary: standard tactical vocabulary varies by game; defer to game_meta.character_vocab and key_mechanics for terms
